text:
routine: cycle of daily events - moves independently indoors. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
102 AC1G AC1G_TOBAC_DAILY (AC1G) Use of Tobacco Products at Least Daily CHAR 1 Customary routine: cycle of daily events - use of tobacco daily. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
103 AC1H AC1H_NONE_ABOVE (AC1H) None of Above Cycle of Daily Events CHAR 1 Customary routine: cycle of daily events - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
104 AC1I AC1I_FOOD_PREF (AC1I)
